case_title: DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP VS. SANFORD GARFINKEL et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-24-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARFINKEL, SANFORD GARFINKEL, NANCIE $4,826.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,936.00, ALTHOUGH CROSS-DEFENDANT MAY HAVE BREACHED THE MANAGEMENT CONTRACT WITH REGARDS TO EXPENDITURES FOR PAINTING AND REPAIRS, THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH ANY DAMAGES SUFFERED AS A PROXIMATE RESULT OF THE BREACH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GARFINKEL, SANFORD GARFINKEL, NANCIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
